description: Curated context index for the Noizy project. Query this before broad repository searches.

retrieval.fallback: Use rg/direct file reads when the top results do not answer the orientation question or when verifying current source.

documents.title: Project overview and stack
documents.summary: High-level map of the Noizy monorepo, current stack, key ports, local credentials, and known drift notes.

documents.title: Backend map
documents.summary: Backend package layout, security behavior, REST controllers, services, persistence, S3 streaming, and event publishing.

documents.title: Frontend map
documents.summary: Angular project layout, routes, service boundaries, auth/mock interceptors, branding assets, and build commands.

documents.title: Infrastructure and local runtime
documents.summary: Docker Compose services, LocalStack resources, ports, Terraform/Kubernetes areas, and runtime coupling.

documents.title: Validation runbook
documents.summary: Known validation commands and when to use backend, frontend, infra, or full-stack checks.

documents.title: Shared memory from prior Noizy work
documents.summary: Reusable project knowledge from the previous Soundly-to-Noizy rename and stack revalidation.

documents.title: RAG maintenance rules
documents.summary: Rules for keeping the local context RAG useful, scoped, current, and free of secrets.
